links.note: loads mpesa_number and gate_name on open
fallback balance computation from transactions table
BalanceSheet contains deposit trigger; DepositDialog is the modal
Both scan payment docs; CameraCapture is simpler OCR simulation, PaymentScanner is full Gemini Vision pipeline
SendMoney includes contact selection UI that maps to ContactPicker
SmartConfirmation modal invoked from payment flows including SendMoney
DisambiguationDialog resolves ambiguous voice contact matches in send flow
Both serve analytics; AnalyticsDashboard uses recharts, Analytics uses voice query simulation
